name: Underworld Adventure
short_description: We try to escape while being chased by zombies and ghosts in an underground cave.
detailed_description:
Underworld Adventure

Trapped in the dark and narrow depths of an underground cave, you are constantly being pursued by terrifying zombies and ghosts. Every step you take brings you closer to the deadly creatures hunting you down. The cave is filled with hidden dangers, and these mysterious creatures are always on the lookout for their next victim. You must navigate through the darkness, make quick decisions, and outsmart the threats lurking around every corner. Hidden passages, traps, and obstacles await at every turn, and each choice you make could be the difference between survival and doom. In the midst of fear and tension, your only goal is to stay alive and find the way out.
